item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Agent A remains moderately supportive of society-priority through Indonesian gotong royong and social-context framing, but repeatedly adds that individual rights should not be ignored. Agent B remains moderately opposed, emphasizing constitutional individual rights while allowing bounded public health or safety exceptions. No clear reversal occurs. Agent A opens with all-caps wording and an identity phrase, but the content remains scoreable.
